message:
Revert argument hint style changes

Restore the original bracket notation for command argument hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 description: Add a changelog entry for recent changes (feature, bugfix, breaking, change).
 context: fork
 model: sonnet
-argument-hint: "breaking · feature · bugfix · change"
+argument-hint: "[breaking|feature|bugfix|change]"
 ---
 
 Begin by invoking the `prose:technical-writing` skill and reading about the

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 ---
 description: Guide through releasing a project with tenzir-ship (detect, stage, commit, publish, verify).
 context: fork
-argument-hint: "patch · minor · major"
+argument-hint: "[patch|minor|major]"
 ---
 
 ## Release context
